capability_declaration.evidence: Capability class definitions within CIM Power System Control & Scheduling model defining supported device functions and control parameters.
capability_declaration.rationale: Explicitly defines endpoint capabilities for interoperability but lacks AI-native self-declaration protocols beyond traditional utility configuration requests.

bounded_authority.evidence: Control Service profiles specifying operational envelopes (MW/MVAR limits), rate-of-change constraints, and time-bound dispatch windows.
bounded_authority.rationale: Specifies control boundaries via service models though missing explicit autonomous agent revocation or override mechanisms.

decision_auditability.evidence: Base measurement/control data classes can theoretically store event logs.
decision_auditability.rationale: Generic schema supports recording control actions but lacks specific mandates for AI reasoning logs or autonomous decision attribution.

data_governance.rationale: Assumes traditional utility-centric ownership without provisions for DER owner consent workflows or third-party agent data retention rules.
